Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And For Sanctions; Index
Off Calendar Feb-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC.'S Motion to Compel Arbitration and for Sanctions. Appearances: Julia M. Adams, Esq. of the Epstein Group, (415) 863-5718, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Laura J. Maechtlen, Esq. of Seyfarth Shaw LLP, (415) 544-1011, appearing for Defendant, Charles Schwab & Co., Inc. and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to compel arbitration and for stay of action is Granted. Request for sanctions is Denied. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
